# KiloMail
> Disposable email service with real-time SSE inboxes.

## Key features
- Instant disposable inboxes at @kilolabs.space
- No sign-up or tracking
- Real-time SSE inbox streaming
- Auto-expiring messages after 10 minutes
- Cloudflare MX routing + Upstash Redis storage
- Open source (MIT license) on Vercel Edge

## URLs
- Website: https://kilomail.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/Cryptoistaken/KiloMail
